sections.sectionTitle: Pasian, Leitung Bup Kumpi Ahihna-ah Minamkimte' Lungdamna

verses.text: Mi khempeuh aw, na khut uh beeng un! Lungdamna la nakpi-in sa-in Pasian phat un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, a Sangpenpa, dipkuathuai a, leitung khempeuh a uk kumpi lian khat ahi hi
Mi khempeuh eima nuai-ah, minamte i khenuai-ah amah in hong zawhsak hi
Ama it Israel-te' angtan'pih eima luah ding leitang amah in hong teelsak hi
Awging tawh Pasian paito a, peengkul aw tawh Topa paito hi
Pasian tungah phatna la sa un, phatna la sa un! I Kumpipa tungah phatna la sa un, phatna la sa un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian pen leitung khempeuhte' kumpi ahi hi. La sakna tawh amah phat un
Pasian in minamte uk a, a tokhom siangtho tungah Pasian tu hi
Uliante leh Abraham' Pasian' mite kipawl khawm uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mite' lumte khempeuh Pasian-a' suak khinta a, amah a sangpi-in kithangsak hi.
